prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约2655→5417→7909→8215→10072，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约7417名，年均后移约1854名；2025年基准位次约10072名，较2024年进一步后移约1857名，下行趋势明显；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为27人，2024年增至30人，2025年增至33人；2026年计划40人，较2025年扩招约21.2%，显著增加招生名额，对位次有推高（数字增大）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第35位，近年稳定在33–35名区间，属于顶尖211/中上985层次，财经类院校中排名最高；2021–2026年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第99位（评价'一般'），短视频曝光量处于同类院校中等水平；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号，报考心理预期稳定；工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，4个学科获评A类，其中2个A+，学科实力在财经类院校中居全国前列，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业社会热度2021–2025年从推荐（72.42）降至分化观望（60.97），整体降温；但计算机类、电子信息类持续高热，上财统计学类、数据科学等交叉专业受益；湖北省物理类考生2021年147111→2025年249802（+69.8%），2026年总考生393700，按近年物理类占比约60.6%估算约238582人，较2025年减少约4.5%，竞争压力略有缓解；上海财经大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对湖北省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在湖北省招生计划近年持。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招21.2%对位次的推高作用、物理类考生总数略有下降对竞争的缓解效应，以及学校声誉稳定、优势学科突出但财经类专业热度分化等因素。预测2026年物理类最低位次约11304名，区间10804–11804名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10804–11804名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报区间，一档专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档专业作为保底。一档的统计学类、会计学、金融学竞争最为激烈，历年min_rank在6373–6845名区间；二档的数据科学、数学类、人工智能等交叉专业兼具上财品牌与工科热度，性价比突出；三档的工商管理类虽学科评估A+但社会热度偏低，适合位次接近区间上限的考生稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category shifted from approximately 2655 to 5417 to 7909 to 8215 to 10072, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 7417 places, with an average annual shift of about 1854 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10072, further shifting backward by about 1857 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 27 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 30 in 2024, and to 33 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 40 students, an expansion of about 21.2% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment quotas, which will push the ranking higher (increase in number).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, stable in the 33-35 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211/upper-middle 985 level, the highest ranking among finance and economics institutions. From 2021 to 2026, no significant negative public opinion incidents were detected in reputation monitoring. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 99th (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium level among similar institutions. No historical abnormal admission records such as gaps were found, indicating stable psychological expectations for applicants. Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with 4 disciplines rated A-class, including 2 A+, placing the university's academic strength among the top in the country for finance and economics, continuously attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors from 2021 to 2025 declined from recommended (72.42) to differentiated wait-and-see (60.97), showing an overall cooling trend. However, computer science and electronic information majors remain highly popular, benefiting cross-disciplinary majors like Statistics and Data Science at SUFE. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province increased from 147,111 in 2021 to 249,802 in 2025 (+69.8%). In 2026, total examinees are 393,700, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 60.6%, approximately 238,582 people, a decrease of about 4.5% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei examinees. The university's enrollment plan in Hubei Province has been stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 21.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 pushing rankings higher, the slight decrease in total Physics Category examinees easing competition, and factors such as stable school reputation, outstanding advantageous disciplines but differentiated popularity of finance majors, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 11304, with a range of 10804-11804.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Statistics Experimental Class, Data Science)
- Accounting
- Finance
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Finance (Digital and Intelligent Finance)
- Investment (Double Degree)
- Insurance (Actuarial Science and Big Data)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Finance (Public Finance, Taxation)
- Investment
- Information Management and Information Systems
- E-commerce (Business Intelligence)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10804-11804, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety. Tier 1 majors like Statistics, Accounting, and Finance are the most competitive, with historical min_rank in the 6373-6845 range. Tier 2 majors like Data Science, Mathematics, and Artificial Intelligence combine SUFE's brand with engineering popularity, offering excellent value. Tier 3 majors like Business Administration, despite an A+ evaluation, have lower social popularity, suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range for a safe choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 273 → 704 → 902 → 1111 → 1149, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 876 places in the past 4 years, averaging about 219 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1149, only 38 places behind 2024, indicating a significant slowdown and stabilization; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 8 in 2024 and 2025; the 2026 plan is 8, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211/upper-middle 985 level, the highest among finance and economics institutions; no significant negative public opinion incidents in reputation monitoring from 2021 to 2026; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 99th (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium level among similar institutions; no signs of admission gaps in historical abnormal records, stable applicant expectations; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, 4 disciplines rated A-class, including 2 A+, with disciplinary strength among the top nationally in finance and economics, maintaining sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of finance/economics/economic majors from 2021 to 2025 declined from recommended (72.42) to divergent watch (60.97), overall cooling; accounting/finance/auditing majors rose from divergent watch to recommended then fell back to divergent watch; law majors remained persistently hot and recommended; Hubei Province History Category candidates were 149,379 in 2021 → 141,436 in 2025 (-5.3%), total candidates in 2026 are 393,700, estimated at about 155,118 based on recent History Category proportion of about 39.4%, an increase of about 9.7% from 2025, intensifying competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates; the university is in Hubei Province's History Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slowing trend of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, an increase of about 9.7% in total History Category candidates leading to intensified competition, stable university reputation, outstanding advantageous disciplines, but divergent popularity of finance majors. Predict the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 to be about 1179, with a range of 1002–1356.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1002–1356, it is recommended to use Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Tier 1 majors like Accounting, Auditing, and Law (International) are the most competitive, with historical min_rank in the 905–1026 range; Tier 2 majors like Accounting ACCA and Finance combine brand and popularity, suitable for candidates in the middle of the range; Tier 3 major International Economics and Trade has the most backward historical rankings, suitable for candidates near the upper bound of the range for a safe choice.
